body_txt: Sometimes the heroes may go up against near-impossible odds where they think they don't have a ghost of a chance; until their backup turns out to be the real deal. This trope occurs wherein somebody dead, often a friend or a relative, assists a living character directly. This doesn't refer to mere advice or moral support; this is when the dead character actually has a physical (usually magical) effect on the world of the living. This can include Spirit Advisor , offense, defense, and often healing. See also Not Too Dead to Save the Day . If the backup comes all the way back , it may be a Climactic Battle Resurrection . See also Guardian Entity .
